messages.error: Oops! Something went wrong while processing your request. Please try again later.
messages.started: AI chat started! I will now respond to your messages. If there is no activity for 5 minutes, I will go to sleep.
messages.timeout: It's been quiet for 5 minutes! I'm going to sleep now. Type !start to chat with me again.
messages.ended: Conversation manually ended! I'm going to sleep now. Type !start to chat with me again.
